title: Smartsheet vs Trello
description: Compare Smartsheet vs Trello in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right project management tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Smartsheet emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Smartsheet or Trello?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Smartsheet edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Smartsheet excels at Spreadsheet-based work management platform for enterprises., while Trello is stronger for Popular kanban-style project management with boards and power-ups.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Smartsheet and Trello?
faqs.answer: Smartsheet and Trello differ in pricing ($7-25/mo vs Free–$17.50/user/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Smartsheet cheaper than Trello?
faqs.answer: Smartsheet starts at $7-25/mo while Trello starts at Free–$17.50/user/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Smartsheet or Trello?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for project management. Smartsheet scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Smartsheet and Trello together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Smartsheet or Trello?
faqs.answer: Both Smartsheet and Trello prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which project management tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Trello for large teams, while Smartsheet may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $7-25/mo pricing.
